channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside number 184 and in line on other side with Beechworth House, 2nd March
item.description:
Two big potholes here Thankmyou for inspecting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Major pothole, 2nd March
item.description:
Major pothole thats grown in size of the space of a week. at the entrance of lordship lane estate where cars, vans and bin tracks enter and exit daily. Big dip in middle of pothole, cant be avoided as its in the centre of the entrance/exit (same entrance and exit)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes left next to po, 2nd March
item.description:
Bike stand gas been allocated outside my post office. The bikes are been dumped outside the po. I am having to move them every morning. If my widow brake I will claming compensation from either the council or the lime company

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tv glass stand left outside on the opposite side rookwood house., 2nd March
item.description:
Tv glass stand left outside on the opposite side rookwood house.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Close, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular serious obstruction of the pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
Nice shop, but unnecessary obstruction of the busy pavement. Nowhere else in Sidcup has this blatant contempt for pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped by upstairs, 2nd March
item.description:
Put there last Friday. Unable to put my bins out as it has taken up space.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is not working, 2nd March
item.description:
Outside no 127 Stanstead Road Street light 0657 is not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanstead Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 2nd March
item.description:
Potholes bothsides all the way from cobbs corner to jews walk how many more bikes wheels do i need to replace before the road gets fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris, 2nd March
item.description:
Is it possible that the contractors can clean up the site outside the old civic centre entrance where they were renewing an electricity supply. There is rubble and mud on the pavement and road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12,14, Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole by bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 2nd March
item.description:
Potholes outside petrol station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 2nd March
item.description:
Potholes & speed table has kerb stone stick up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jews Walk, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tip on pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
The perennial problem of fly-tipping at this location is appalling again. Tyres, rolls of flooring material, bags of rubbish and commercial bins overflowing. It has been like this all weekend and was all still there this morning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible abandoned vehicle, 2nd March
item.description:
Car: Model Mercedes-Benz A-Class Colour: Silver / Fuel Type: Petrol / Engine Size: 1498cc / Registered: November 2005 Vehicle Age: 20 Years This vehicle has been parked up, adjacent to 9/9a Oakleigh Crescent, Whetstone, London, N20 for approx 5 months now. Whilst the vehicle is Taxed & MOT'd it is, nevertheless, recorded for: "Outstanding Recall". This may explain why the owner has not touched the vehicle in that time. Please can the council chase this up as parking is of a premium in the crescent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakleigh Crescent, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x bases of a double bed along two drawers fly tipped., 2nd March
item.description:
2 x bases of a double bed along two matching drawers dumped on grass verge near fence.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charles Grinling Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 46-224 Elmley Street, 2nd March
item.description:
Pallets and furniture being added to daily
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmley Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items obstructing Wick Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Two tables & large toy car dumped obstructing traffic on Wick Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported vehicle across pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
Have reported this before. Obstruction causing those with prams out into the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cannister, 2nd March
item.description:
Dumped at side of road of the opening In st Mary’s Road to Aldi. As these cannot be put in ordinary rubbish I could not remove and place safely into any nearby bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Marys Road, White Oak, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are extra green bins outside 14 & 15 Alfriston Close, 2nd March
item.description:
There are extra green bins outside 14 & 15 Alfriston Close - unneeded by residents. Please collect.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alfriston Close, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
